Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jason Szydlik, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Santos Puc Cuoch, an individual on behalf of himself and on behalf of the general public.
No appearance by defendants Navinder Singh, an individual or Bhandal and Kang Foods, Inc., a California Corporation, dba India Palace Restaurant.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Santos Puc Cuoch, an individual on behalf of himself and on behalf of the general public, and against the Defaulted Defendants Navinder Singh, an individual and Bhandal and Kang Foods, Inc., a California Corporation, dba India Palace Restaurant as follows:

Damages/Principal - $68,813.76.
Prejudgment Interest - $30,988.99.
Attorney's Fees - $6,084.00.
Waiting Time Penalty - $3,211.80.
Costs - $890.88, for a total judgment in the amount of $109,989.43.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
